mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT sgc.subject, sgc.SUBJ_CL_ID , sc.SUBJ_CL_NM FROM SUNEUNG_GRADE_CUT sgc INNER JOIN SUBJECT_CLASSIFICATION sc ON sgc.SUBJ_CL_ID = sc.SUBJ_CL_ID
select distinct year from suneung_grade_cut order by year desc
SELECT DISTINCT exam_type FROM suneung_grade_cut WHERE year = #{year} order by exam_type

SELECT DISTINCT sgc.subject, sgc.SUBJ_CL_ID , sc.SUBJ_CL_NM FROM SUNEUNG_GRADE_CUT sgc INNER JOIN SUBJECT_CLASSIFICATION sc ON sgc.SUBJ_CL_ID = sc.SUBJ_CL_ID WHERE sgc.year = #{year} AND sgc.exam_type = #{examType} ORDER BY sgc.SUBJ_CL_ID, sgc.subject
